reference: MARIUS SENT BACK THE THIRTY LOUIS TO HIS AUNT WITH A RESPECTFUL LETTER IN WHICH HE STATED THAT HE HAD SUFFICIENT MEANS OF SUBSISTENCE AND THAT HE SHOULD BE ABLE THENCEFORTH TO SUPPLY ALL HIS NEEDS
text: Maria sent back the thirty louis to his aunt with the respectful letter, in which he stated that he had sufficient means of subsistence and that he should be able thenceforth to supply all his needs.
